title: rubus subhirtus
intro: Rubus subhirtus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Rubus subhirtus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve heart health, and act as an anti-cancer agent. Rubus subhirtus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
